texto: It is not enough to be electors only. It is necessary to be law-makers
autor: otherwise those who can be law-makers will be the masters of those who can only be electors.
explicacao: Citação de otherwise those who can be law-makers will be the masters of those who can only be electors. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “It is not enough to be electors only. It is necessary to be law-makers” articula reflexao, b-r-ambedkar, enough em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
